spec_match.rationale: Chromium-catches-up feature — the spec already documents the behaviour, so the value of the demo is the interop story. The concept exercises one corner but the before/after comparison isn't always crisp.

interactive.rationale: 7 buttons / 0 inputs / 0 selects / 0 ranges driving live JS — well past the static-card bar.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Either the feature-index blurb or the concept lede is missing — can't verify alignment.

edge_cases.rationale: Page handles real failure modes — feature detection, permission rejection, fallback paths are all wired into the script.

references.rationale: Page includes the chromestatus.com/feature/6739764319485952 link in the see-also section.

design_system.rationale: Mostly on the design system but 3 raw hex literal(s) leaked into inline CSS — should be replaced with the --accent / --text / --bg variables.

openQuestions.title: Cover the spec aspect: no-pointer device fallback (touch input)
openQuestions.detail: The pointer-lock-on-android feature's headline framing — Pointer Lock API now available on Android (raw mouse deltas, cursor hidden) — calls out "no-pointer device fallback (touch input)". This concept page does not exercise that, so the spec story is incomplete from this page alone. Either extend this demo or land a sibling concept dedicated to it.

openQuestions.title: Cover the spec aspect: first-person camera / orbit controls as the canonical use ca
openQuestions.detail: The pointer-lock-on-android feature's headline framing — Pointer Lock API now available on Android (raw mouse deltas, cursor hidden) — calls out "first-person camera / orbit controls as the canonical use cases". This concept page does not exercise that, so the spec story is incomplete from this page alone. Either extend this demo or land a sibling concept dedicated to it.

openQuestions.title: Replace raw hex colours with design-system variables
openQuestions.detail: Found 3 raw hex literal(s) in the inline <style> block. The shared system defines --accent-blue, --accent-emerald, --accent-rose, --bg-ivory, --bg-paper, --bg-stone, --text-black, --text-charcoal, --text-muted. Swap them in and re-check WCAG AA contrast.

openQuestions.title: Align the concept lede with the feature-index blurb
openQuestions.detail: The blurb on the feature index sells one promise; the concept lede frames a different angle. Either reword the lede to echo the blurb's keywords (so visitors recognise they're in the right place) or update the parent blurb.

summary: gesture-recorder under pointer-lock-on-android: 3 pass / 3 partial / 0 fail. Strong interactive surface, design-system drift, spec story is partial — see open questions for the angles still missing.
